items.title: Notice: Warm Homes Loan Scheme: apply to participate as a lender (Phase 1)
items.summary: The Warm Homes Loan Scheme (WHLS) will unlock private lending and investment at scale for home retrofit.

items.title: Government has secured £100 billion of clean energy investment
items.summary: Energy Secretary announces that government has secured £100 billion of private clean energy investment.

items.summary: Weekly prices of unleaded petrol and diesel.

items.summary: Data to monitor the installation of energy efficiency measures in domestic properties via the Warm Homes: Local Grant scheme in England.

items.summary: UK local authority and regional estimates of greenhouse gas emissions from 2005.

items.title: Wales’s foreign investment win boosts economy and jobs market
items.summary: Statistics released today (23 June) show that Wales continues to successfully attract foreign investors.

items.summary: Data for 2026 on redress for postmasters impacted by the Post Office Horizon scandal.

items.title: More oil and gas workers to be supported into jobs
items.summary: More oil and gas workers across Scotland will be offered tailored skills support to seize high-quality jobs in energy and other growth sectors.

items.summary: Consumption statistics for fuels used in road transport at regional and local levels from 2005.

items.title: Guidance: Guidance on the scope of FWA gangmasters licensing standard 7.1
items.summary: Further explanation about licensing standard 7.1, which covers work finding services that licence holders cannot charge a worker for.

items.title: Policy paper: Carbon budget and growth delivery plan
items.summary: The Carbon Budget and Growth Delivery Plan sets out how the government meets its statutory carbon budgets and secure the benefits of this transition for people and businesses.

items.title: Guidance: UK net zero transition: investment opportunities
items.summary: This investor prospectus outlines where and how investors can support the UK’s net zero transition.

items.title: Guidance: Carbon budget and growth delivery plan: Heat and buildings factsheet
items.summary: The Carbon budget and growth delivery plan (CBGDP) investor factsheet sets out the opportunities for the heat and buildings sector as the UK transitions to clean energy.

items.summary: This guidance is provided to help agency workers who have raised or need to raise a complaint to FWA about their recruitment agency.

items.summary: We are consulting on a draft code of practice on electronic and workplace balloting for statutory trade union ballots.

items.title: Make Work Pay: protection from detriments for taking industrial action
items.summary: We are seeking views on the types of detriments that employers should be prohibited from imposing on workers for taking industrial action.
